title: senecio lanosissimus
intro: Senecio lanosissimus is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae, and is native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Senecio lanosissimus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and steeping them in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
